title.en: China-to-Bahrain Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入巴林：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入巴林：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Bahrain BSMD standards screening, IEC 62109 safety evidence, EWA grid-connection and net-metering requirements, Sustainable Energy Authority (SEA) net-metering policy, and 50 Hz site requirements versus China GB/T 37408-2019 and GB/T 19964-2024.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国光伏逆变器文件与巴林BSMD标准筛查、IEC 62109安全证据、EWA并网和净计量要求、可持续能源局（SEA）净计量政策和50Hz场址要求，以及中国GB/T 37408-2019和GB/T 19964-2024差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國光伏逆變器文件與巴林BSMD標準篩查、IEC 62109安全證據、EWA併網和淨計量要求、可持續能源局（SEA）淨計量政策和50Hz場址要求，以及中國GB/T 37408-2019和GB/T 19964-2024差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSMD scope determination, EWA grid-connection approval, SEA net-metering approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Bahrain BSMD, EWA, SEA, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSMD适用范围裁定、EWA并网批准、SEA净计量批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴林BSMD、EWA、SEA、海关和项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSMD適用範圍裁定、EWA併網批准、SEA淨計量批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴林BSMD、EWA、SEA、海關和項目要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Bahrain, public sources do not show one universal mandatory whole-product certificate at the product-import level, but EWA material-approval listing is required for inverters used in net-metering or grid-connected installations. IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 safety evidence is the international baseline expected by EWA-approved consultants and project stakeholders. The main gaps versus China documentation are the EWA material-approval route, 50 Hz grid settings (Bahrain operates at 50 Hz / 230 V), and anti-islanding and voltage/frequency ride-through settings to EWA grid-code tolerances.
answer_first.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口巴林时，公开资料未显示在产品进口层面存在单一通用强制整机证书，但用于净计量或并网装置的逆变器须取得EWA物料认可备案。IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据是EWA认可顾问和项目方期望的国际基准。与中国文件相比，主要差距在于EWA物料认可路径、50Hz并网整定（巴林采用50Hz / 230V）以及符合EWA电网规程容差的防孤岛和电压/频率穿越整定。
answer_first.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口巴林時，公開資料未顯示在產品進口層面存在單一通用強制整機證書，但用於淨計量或併網裝置的逆變器須取得EWA物料認可備案。IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據是EWA認可顧問和項目方期望的國際基準。與中國文件相比，主要差距在於EWA物料認可路徑、50Hz併網整定（巴林採用50Hz / 230V）以及符合EWA電網規程容差的防孤島和電壓／頻率穿越整定。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, standards publisher, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
